6:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN c1.Segment = 'SME' AND c2.Segment = 'LAM' THEN 'SME-LAM'
        WHEN c1.Segment = 'LAM' AND c2.Segment = 'KAM' THEN 'LAM-KAM'
        WHEN c1.Segment = 'KAM' AND c2.Segment = 'SME' THEN 'KAM-SME'
    END AS SegmentPair,
    AVG(c1.AnnualConsumption) - AVG(c2.AnnualConsumption) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS AnnualConsumption
    FROM
        customers c
    JOIN
        yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE
        c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
    GROUP BY
        c.CustomerID, c.Segment
    ORDER BY
        AnnualConsumption ASC
    LIMIT 1
) c1
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS AnnualConsumption
    FROM
        customers c
    JOIN
        yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE
        c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
    GROUP BY
        c.CustomerID, c.Segment
    ORDER BY
        AnnualConsumption ASC
    LIMIT 1
) c2
WHERE
    (c1.Segment = 'SME' AND c2.Segment = 'LAM')
    OR (c1.Segment = 'LAM' AND c2.Segment = 'KAM')
    OR (c1.Segment = 'KAM' AND c2.Segment = 'SME')
GROUP BY
    SegmentPair;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT
    c.Segment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption_2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption_2013,
    ROUND(
        (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
         SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100.0, 2
    ) AS PercentageIncrease
FROM
    yearmonth y
JOIN
    customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE
    c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY
    c.Segment
ORDER BY
    PercentageIncrease DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT
    CASE WHEN Admission = 'In-patient' THEN 'In-patient' ELSE 'Outpatient' END AS AdmissionType,
    COUNT(*) AS Count
FROM Patient
WHERE SEX = 'Male'
GROUP BY AdmissionType;

WITH MaleCounts AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN Admission = 'In-patient' THEN 'In-patient' ELSE 'Outpatient' END AS AdmissionType,
        COUNT(*) AS Count
    FROM Patient
    WHERE SEX = 'Male'
    GROUP BY AdmissionType
)
SELECT
    (SELECT Count FROM MaleCounts WHERE AdmissionType = 'In-patient') AS InPatientCount,
    (SELECT Count FROM MaleCounts WHERE AdmissionType = 'Outpatient') AS OutpatientCount,
    ROUND(
        (SELECT Count FROM MaleCounts WHERE AdmissionType = 'In-patient') * 100.0 /
        (SELECT SUM(Count) FROM MaleCounts) -
        (SELECT Count FROM MaleCounts WHERE AdmissionType = 'Outpatient') * 100.0 /
        (SELECT SUM(Count) FROM MaleCounts), 2
    ) AS PercentageDeviation
FROM MaleCounts
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.gender = 'male' AND (strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' OR strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997');	----- bird -----	financial
